sanskrit:
तेषां सततयुक्तानां भजतां प्रीतिपूर्वकम्।
ददामि बुद्धियोगं तं येन मामुपयान्ति ते॥
transliteration:
teṣāṃ satata-yuktānāṃ bhajatāṃ prīti-pūrvakam |
dadāmi buddhi-yogaṃ taṃ yena mām upayānti te ||
literal_meaning: To them—ever-integrated, worshiping with love—I bestow the yoga-of-intelligence by which they come to Me.
contextual_meaning: When a person sustains wholehearted, affectionate engagement, the Self within supplies the precise insight needed to reach wholeness.

shadow: Doubt about being worthy of divine response

psychological_state: Secure attachment to an inner source; experienced as sudden clarity or intuitive knowing that resolves prior confusion.
trigger_scenario: A therapist who meditates daily and volunteers at a shelter suddenly 'knows' the right intervention for a suicidal teen—an 'aha' that feels given, not manufactured.
anchor_text: Love God with all your heart and clarity will arise within.
